{"voice": "digitalisgazdasagi", "reactions": [{"scenario": "S1", "stance": "support", "label": "value_modeled", "source": "", "basis": "Employers and the tech sector depend on a predictable, transparent talent pipeline; SES-aware admission quotas and uniform score thresholds reduce arbitrariness and administrative chaos that currently distorts hiring signals.
